title: Executive/ Admin (Grant Management)
description:
Avensys is a reputed global IT professional services company headquartered in Singapore. Our service spectrum includes enterprise solution consulting, business intelligence, business process automation and managed services. Given our decade of success we have evolved to become one of the top trusted providers in Singapore and service a client base across banking and financial services, insurance, information technology, healthcare, retail and supply chain.

We are hiring a Executive/ Admin (Grant Management) with experience in cross-functional, international environments. This role offers strong growth opportunities and a healthy work–life balance. More details as below:

Key Duties & Responsibilities

  • Perform day-to-day operational tasks related to the administration of the SkillsFuture Singapore (SSG) and other grants managed by the Unit as a Grant Business Partner.
  • Liaise with Client's CET units, relevant SCALE units, SSG and other grant agencies as needed on policy/process changes, documentation and reporting requirements.
  • Provide strong administrative support for grant claims and disbursement.
  • Manage queries from Client's CET units regarding grant processes and compliance.
  • Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of all grant-related documentation.
  • Support grant audit activities by preparing necessary documentation and reports.
  • Assist in streamlining processes for greater efficiency and compliance.

Experience & Attributes:

  • 1-2 years of related working experience. Fresh graduates are welcome to apply.
  • Prior experience in grant administration will be an advantage.
  • Strong attention to detail, organisational skills, and ability to manage multiple tasks efficiently.
  • Good communication (verbal and written) and interpersonal skills, with a positive work attitude.
  • Strong team player who is resourceful, resilient and thrives in a fast-paced work environment.

If you are interested kindly share you latest resume.

WHAT’S ON OFFER:

You will be remunerated with an excellent base salary and entitled to attractive company benefits. Additionally, you will get the opportunity to enjoy a fun and collaborative work environment, alongside a strong career progression

To submit your application, please apply online or email your UPDATED CV in Microsoft Word format to swathi@aven-sys.com Your interest will be treated with strict confidentiality.

CONSULTANT DETAILS:

Consultant Name : Swathi

Avensys Consulting Pte Ltd

EA Licence 12C5759

Privacy Statement: Data collected will be used for recruitment purposes only. Personal data provided will be used strictly in accordance with the relevant data protection law and Avensys' privacy policy

postedCompany.description: Avensys is among the leaders in providing technology enabled business solutions and services. Since inception, Avensys has helped clients use IT more efficiently to improve their operations and profitability, focus on core competencies and achieve business results such as increased agility, innovation and profitable growth. Our in-depth technical knowledge coupled with industry experience and our unique methodologies enable us to successfully deliver and meet our customer’s expectations.
